summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Estate Tea e-commerce site - Iteration 3 (Open-Meteo Weather API). All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features working correctly: entry form (name-only), dual Hot/Cold tea options, checkout page with Razorpay, PaymentSuccessModal with invoice notice.
critical_code_review_comments: Weather API now uses REAL Open-Meteo data (FREE, no API key) - returns actual temperatures for Indian cities
Fallback weather only triggers if Open-Meteo API is completely unreachable
PaymentSuccessModal has correct invoice notice with Mail icon and data-testid='invoice-notice'
Email (Resend) and SMS (Twilio) services are NOT CONFIGURED - graceful degradation
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features tested and working: 1) Weather API uses Open-Meteo (FREE, no key) - returns REAL temperatures (Bangalore ~32°C, Shimla ~16°C, Delhi ~33°C), 2) Weather with lat/lon coordinates works correctly, 3) Unknown cities fall back gracefully, 4) Weather conditions mapped from WMO codes (Clear Sky, Partly Cloudy, etc.), 5) Tea recommendations based on real temperature, 6) PaymentSuccessModal has invoice notice with Mail icon (data-testid='invoice-notice'), 7) Entry form is name-only (no location/age fields), 8) Store shows dual Hot/Cold options when location denied, 9) Checkout page with Razorpay button works, 10) Webhook endpoint handles payment events correctly.

weather_api_verification.shimla: 16.5°C, Clear Sky - REAL DATA (cooler hill station)
weather_api_verification.delhi_with_coords: 33.6°C, Partly Cloudy - REAL DATA with lat/lon
weather_api_verification.unknown_city: Falls back gracefully with hash-based temperature

features_tested.weather_bangalore_real_temp: PASS - Returns real temperature from Open-Meteo (~32°C)
features_tested.weather_shimla_cooler: PASS - Returns cooler temperature for hill station (~16°C)
features_tested.weather_delhi_with_coords: PASS - Accepts lat/lon and returns real weather
features_tested.weather_unknown_city_fallback: PASS - Falls back gracefully for unknown cities
features_tested.weather_condition_mapping: PASS - WMO codes mapped to readable conditions
features_tested.entry_form_name_only: PASS - Only name input, no location/age fields
features_tested.dual_tea_options: PASS - Hot Tea and Iced Tea sections visible when location denied
features_tested.checkout_page: PASS - Order summary, customer details, Razorpay button
features_tested.payment_success_modal_invoice_notice: PASS - Component has data-testid='invoice-notice' with Mail icon and 'Invoice sent to your email' text
features_tested.razorpay_webhook: PASS - Handles payment.captured and payment_link.paid events
